channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Top Tech Moguls Attend Trump's Inauguration: A List of Guests
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has invited several top tech moguls and billionaires to attend his inauguration on Jan. 20, including Elon Musk, Mark Zuckerberg, Jeff Bezos, TikTok CEO Shou Zi Chew, Google CEO Sundar Pichai, and Apple CEO Tim Cook.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Federated Learning: Revolutionizing AI Integration in Enterprises
item.description: Federated learning is an emerging approach that enables organizations to train large language models using their private data, without compromising security or moving sensitive information to public clouds.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
